description:
You are acting as an integration-developer who is about to begin testing several REST APIs.  
Before you start, create a clean Python virtual environment so that your forthcoming
package installs do not pollute the global interpreter.

TARGET VIRTUAL-ENVIRONMENT
• Absolute path that must be used:  
  /home/user/api_integration_env

PROOF-OF-CREATION LOG  
After the virtual environment is created, you must record evidence in the log file  
/home/user/setup_logs/venv_creation.log

Log-file requirements (these are case-sensitive and must match **exactly**):  
1. The file must contain **exactly two lines** – nothing more, nothing less.  
2. Line-1 text:  
   ENV_PATH=/home/user/api_integration_env  
3. Line-2 text:  
   STATUS=CREATED  
4. Each of the two lines must be terminated by a single “\n” newline character.  
5. There must be no blank lines, additional spaces, tabs, or carriage returns anywhere in the file.

VERIFICATION DETAILS THE TEST HARNESS WILL CHECK  
1. Directory /home/user/api_integration_env exists.  
2. Executable file /home/user/api_integration_env/bin/python exists.  
3. File /home/user/setup_logs/venv_creation.log exists and its contents match the
   two-line, newline-terminated format specified above, with no extra characters.

CONSTRAINTS  
• You do NOT have root privileges; stay completely within /home/user.  
• Only standard Python tooling available in a default Linux distribution may be used (no conda, no virtualenvwrapper).  
• Accomplish the setup with as few commands as you deem reasonable, but you must at minimum:
  – create the virtual environment using the built-in venv module,  
  – create the directory /home/user/setup_logs if it does not yet exist, and  
  – write the log file in the required format.

The task is complete when all three automated checks succeed.
truth:
Directory that must exist after completion:
/home/user/api_integration_env

Key files that must exist after completion:
/home/user/api_integration_env/bin/python   (must be executable)

Log file that must exist after completion:
/home/user/setup_logs/venv_creation.log

Exact required contents of /home/user/setup_logs/venv_creation.log (each line ends with '\n'):
ENV_PATH=/home/user/api_integration_env\n
STATUS=CREATED\n
